scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field2]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field2]@[field3]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: SBC Automation User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000

ACK [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field2]@[field3]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Automation Content-Length: 0

REFER [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field2]@[field3]>[peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 REFER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Refer-To: <sip:[field4]@[field5]> Referred-By: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Automation Content-Length: 0

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 [last_via] From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field2]@[field3]>[peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
